creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #7)
Both depend on boost as well.

I tried with the qbittorrent-nox version and it fails too:

qBittorrent version: v3.3.10
stack trace:
  0x802fe5def <pthread_getspecific+0xeaf> at /lib/libthr.so.3
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

But it appears the -nox version also depends on libQt5Network
